                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               <NA>
## 26                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           <NA>
## 27                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       I love Laura Geller’s makeup products! There is not one product she makes that I have not been absolutely delighted with so far! And here is ANOTHER one! I saw the blush serum on a social media ad, of all places. I already love her baked and brighten powdered blushes, but sometimes a girl with older, dry skin can use a little hydration. I went directly on Amazon (because I am spoiled like that and I love how easy they make it to get exactly what you want in just a few days!) and I looked up the product. After looking at the photos of the models with the different color skin tones, I finally decided on the Refreshing Rose color for my first try of this product.  I got it pretty quickly, within 2 days. I took it out of the box, it was nicely packaged.  It came with a clean, white, sponge tip applicator already attached, and a spare for later.  I had to turn the dial at the bottom of the tube quite a few times before it primed the sponge applicator with any product.  At first I wondered if I had received an empty tube?!  But no, it’s in there, you just have to get it started.  Once I saw the serum start to come up into the sponge tip applicator, I stopped turning the dial and just pressed the applicator to my cheek a few times and it wet the rest of the sponge applicator just fine that way. (I didn’t want to get it too sloppy and waste any product.) Wow.  Let me just say. It IS definitely a serum.  It glides on like silk and it blends like a dream.  The color, like all of Laura’s products, is buildable,  sheer, and so natural looking on the skin.  I applied it to one cheek only and my sister and I did a “stare-and-compare” to my plain cheek.  My sister said “Wow!! I love it! You look alive!” LOL!  It’s beautiful. I am older (62) and I tend to have dryer skin, but I think this would be gorgeous on any skin type, of any age.  When I first applied it and had those 3 little dots of blush on my cheek, I wondered if it would be too colorful.  No. It blends so beautifully (with either a brush or your fingers!) and makes you look like you have a pretty, sexy little flush to your skin.  I am pale with olive undertones. I mix Laura Geller’s Baked & Brighten baked powder  foundation in Porcelain and Fair and it gives me the perfect skin tone match for my skin.  Based on this and the website, I chose the Refreshing Rose as my “best” (most natural) match.  But I would probably try a few more in other colors, I don’t think you could go wrong with this sheer formula.  I like to wear warm colors, as well as cool colors, so I like to have lipsticks and blushes in reds, pinks, peaches, roses, mauves, and beige tones, on hand, so that I don’t look “off” when I change up my wardrobe colors. For those of us who like our color options to vary, Laura’s got it covered! Another fantastic product by Laura Geller, courtesy of Amazon!  Thank you both!
## 28                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                I love that this is a liquid rather than a powder for a dewy look. It only takes one dot and I blend it in by dabbing my fingers lightly on my cheeks. Just what I have been searching for! It is the perfect compliment to Laura Gellar's liquid foundation. Great for aging skin.
## 29                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 This Laura Geller Blush is a very nice product. The color is very natural looking and if after the initial application too faint can be applied again without being too much. I only wish there were instructions included on how to use the product effectively…you twist from the bottom to release the blush onto the soft applicator but how long do you keep twisting? How do you apply it…streak it on, dot it on, use a brush, use your fingers? Not rocket science and you can figure it out but instructions would have been helpful.
## 30                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    I liked the shade of color and the orice was fair. I dont think it works well iver the Baked face makeup because it is liquid so seems to remove the baked makeup. I probably wouldnt orderi it again because I can only use it with liquid makeup but its a good option for a bare face so will save for Summer when i have a tan or when i just use tinted moisturizer.
## 31                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        I luv the fact that its like a watercolor, can be sheer, add more for stronger color if needed.  Totally sheer
## 32                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Nice color, easy to apply. I like this product. It lasts all day and is easy to remove. It doesn’t aggravate my skin either. A very good product. Definitely recommend.
## 33                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           It also includes a replacement sponge tip- which is nice.
## 34                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      This blush is so pretty and blends easily.
## 35                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          I chose practical pink as I am in my 70s with white hair and thought it would be the most natural tint for my colouring. I am very pleased with the colour it provides, just enough to look like a healthy glow and not a heart attack about to happen!! It applies smoothly and is so easy to blend, I love it.

## 37                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      this blush is a beauty, very subtle, buildable, I would definitely recommend, what's not so great is couldn't return it.
## 38                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    I love this blusher. You need very little and it blends easily with your fingers or a brush. Great colour, it adds warmth but it’s quite natural. Just add another layer of colour if you want it to be more vibrant.

## 61                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I have been using the Maybelline Fit Me Blush for years now. You can't beat the price point and the blush does a good job of staying put on my face. It also allows for buildup if you are looking for a more dramatic look. The compact is a great size for travel and I love that I can just use the brush I like to apply it. Hopefully Maybelline will continue offering this one for years to come!
## 62                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The blush is exactly what I wanted.
## 63                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               I got this in Plum and am very fair. This barely shows up. I compared it to Covergirl Cheekers in the same color and that has more pigment and a nice sheen. Disappointed.

## 86
