                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               <NA>
## 87                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         I was super excited when I found this product and it came out amazing! I tried it as soon as it came in, the application is super smooth, it spreads well, and the color is gorgeous. I used it as eye shadow and blush and I think it gives a great minimalistic look if that’s what you’re searching for! I applied with a finger and smoothed out with a brush, the pigment is just right for blush but if you’re looking for something darker or stronger in color this may not be the right choice for eyeshadow. Still a great option to have! Highly recommend!
## 88                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  I hate the color of my lips naturally, they are just so washed out.  I often want a nudish shade to just give a little bit of color and still look pretty natural, just look better.  And I absolutely abhor shiny, gel slicked, sticky products on my lips.  This has the very slightest shimmer, and is a great nude tone for me, without being absolutely nude.  I can only feel it on my lips for a brief time, so if you are expecting a waxy product that sits longer like a chapstick or other lip balm, this also won't fit your needs.This is Sparkling Rose.  Also works as blush in a pinch, I just prefer how powdered blushes go on, as it's easy to overdo it with the way the sticks apply to the skin.  And yes, you don't get much product, but if you compare to how much product is in any lipstick or balm, it's about the same.  $5.00 is a great price.
## 89                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  I like the color of this product .It is pink but its more of a salmon pink rather than a bubblegum pink .I can put it on lightly for a touch of color or I can add more for more extreme color - for lips or as a blush. I actually prefer using this as a blush. I dot it on lightly at first, then determine whether or not I need more. I have a fair complexion and have found that it blends well with my skin tone and does not turn orange .I have also been using it on my lips. And even though I like the color, I have found it to be a little dry. I have found that applying some clear gloss or moisturizing lip treatment  first will take care of this. Overall , though, I'm pretty happy with this product.
## 90                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  I use this as a blush but see from the reviews that people used it as a tinted gloss which is such a good idea. I love it because I am over 70, very fair skinned and powder blush (and I have tried all the brands) just accentuates lines and wrinkles. And many cream blush are just so heavy. This one is perfect for me because it is sheer, moisturized and just a tint of color which looks natural and doesn't make me look like I have on clown makeup which is easy to have happen with older skin.
## 91                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Second bottle of exactly the same product.  Usually I don’t wear makeup, but these days, I want to add some hint of color to my cheeks.  This sparkling rose isn’t much more prominent than my earlier one when I apply it lightly. A lot more muted than the color panel choice.  Blending well and generally happy with the quality at such a low price.  Not sure if I want to apply around my sensitive eyes though.
## 92                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          This is my first experience with Elf products and it won’t be my last.  I absolutely LOVE THE BLUSH and how it goes on.  It goes on so smoothly and stays on. No smearing.  I can’t wait to order my Elf products.  I definitely recommend!!
## 93                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       This works so great, the color is a little off, but i love the creaminess of it. and it stays on all day it is blendable and smooth and it is a very nice product. can use a brush or your fingers it is very blendable.
## 94                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       I chose the color. I wish the color was slightly more saturated but again I chose this shade. It is buildable and lasts for approximately 6 hours. If I pair it with a powder blush too it lasts all day. I have combination skin. I am dryer now than I used to be. My pores are moderately sized.
## 95                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               It's nice, smooth and not too shiny (I bought dazzling peony). I expected a more pinky colour, it has a slight orangey hue, but I prefer it like this. Very good for the cheeks, I find it somehow dry for the lips, make sure to hydrate before applying.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Tenia mis dudas de comprar un maquillaje 3 en 1...pero primero me los puse como sombra y difumine con él dedo... Wow, super natural y me duró todo el día. Igual lo use como chapa y poco en los labios... Muy sorprendida de los resultado, fácil de poner y muy natural. Muy feliz con este maquillaje...

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  <NA>
## 114                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The blush is highly pigmented. The color is what i was looking for. A little bit goes a long way with this blush. Tap lightly on the blush because it does give you excess on it. The color looked lighter compared to the picture on Amazon and I was feeling a bit disappointed. But the color comes through just like the picture on Amazon. The price for this blush was also worth it. This will be my go to blush from now on. It also arrived in perfect condition.
## 115                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                I found that the blush is a longer-lasting, silkier blush. This formula smooths out imperfections such as fine lines and enlarged pores while delivering stunning color payoff that enhances your skin beautifully. Despite its rich pigmentation, it blends effortlessly, allowing you to tailor your look to perfection. It comes in a wide range of colors and finishes. I really like it!
## 116                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                it goes on smooth, but it runs out really fast and little too powdery

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    I have bought these blushes before. They look so natural and light. Even better, the price is amazingly Nguyen’s. You can’t go wrong with this product. It also lasts a long time!

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               The shine/highlight is pretty bright in this. The color is nice, but the shimmer can overpower the pink tones.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This is my go to blush, i originally purchased it for musical theater performances because i needed a new one but now i wear it everywhere. It has a slight sparkle that looks beautiful and I love the way it highlights my cheeks. The quality is good and i have always been able to depend on this brand.
