##                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ReviewText
## 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Subtle color on light/med skin tone. Use as little as possible or you'll be trying to blend so much you'll remove your foundation. I use 1 dot on my hand and pick it up with a brush and it's enough for both cheeks. Blends nicely if you use it sparingly. Will definitely try more colors.
## 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             For the price I liked it a lot. A tiny bit goes a long way. The colour suits my skin tone with just a tad bit applied and spread out.
## 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           This blush is currently my new favorite blush. Previous had several expensive designer brands and for the price and quality, cannot beat it. Works great, pigmented and lasts all day.Only use a little and build from there. A little goes a long way!
## 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             This is such a pretty dewy blush, I love the color too. It also lasts all day which is great. My only complaint is that it can show up patchy.I’d reccommend NOT putting any foundation underneath the areas you’re applying this blush because it most likely will lift up your foundation and make it look patchy. Instead, mix this blush with the foundation and apply it as one layer on your cheeks.Once I started this technique the blush worked beautifully.
## 5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Its a good product, but does not compare to a high-end like the Charlotte Tilbury selection.The color is glowy and beautiful, but does not blends well and ends up patchy.
## 6                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Wow, Loreal got a homerun with this product!  But now I'm sad bc I loved it so much I came back to get a couple more shades and they're out of stock! I got the Dewy Bright Pink and the Worth It Medium and they spread and blend like butter then dry down to a  long lasting finish. The Dewy Bright Pink is just that but is not too bright, no sparkle and just right for that Pow! Pop of colour. The Worth It Med is the most gorgeous berry shade but don't be scared of it.  A tiny dot goes a long way with these so they'll last you a long time before you need to repurchase.  Fabuloso, Loreal!
## 7                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                This liquid blush is everything and more. The shades are gorgeous. The color pay off is incredible and the way it melts into the skin and leaves a beautiful stunning glow is exactly what I was looking for and more. I'm just so impressed with this drug store blush. I guess I shouldn't be too surprised because the tru match line is my favorite drug store foundation and concealer. I highly HIGHLY recommend this product. Chefs kiss!!!
## 8                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The color they show on the pictures with all different tones of skin, had to be photoshopped. It was like clown make up.
## 9                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               It’s so pretty, and you can build up the colour. It blends very nicely. I recommend
## 10                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         This is a great long wearing blush though very pigmented…use a light hand when applying!
## 11                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Ce produit est juste PARFAIT ! Il s'applique bien, ne sèche aucunement lorsque je le blend, ne fait AUCUNE TÂCHE lors de l'application... la couleur est belle et brillante ;-) je suis SATISFAITE de ce produit ! L'Oréal a créé une pépite !  Je le recommande fortement !
## 12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
## 13                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Beautiful blush. Stunning on skin. Loved it.
## 14                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            I used only a small dab on each side and it was VERY pigmented. Might be too much pigment for me as a pale female. Does spread nicely with beauty blender. Lasted all day. The small container will last a long time.
## 15                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>

## 23                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 24                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 25                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 26                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 27                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This is really nice for everyday use.  I'm glad I got it.
## 28                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     I am pretty impressed with this face cream! It is much thinner than what I am used to with any daily sunscreens. It's so nice to apply and does not feel heavy on the skin. It doesn't have a strong scent and it absorbs quickly. Very comfortable to wear!
## 29                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                I love it and want a HUGE bottle. Moisturizing and melts into my face. I love it!
## 30                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                All three coordinated together for those who are sun sensitive.  Effective when used as directed.
## 31                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Makes the face shiny and slightly oily
## 32                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Really nice every day lotion, with SPF.
## 33                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       The photo on the product description page confused me. I thought I was getting two full-size products -- a moisturizing lotion and a separate sunscreen -- plus a single use face serum sample. I was right about the sample but there is only one main item, a "collagen moisture filler sunscreen" in a handy travel-size tube.I was certainly aware of the L'OREAL brand but had never before tried anything in the product line. I like this lotion. My favorite thing about it is that it's fragrance free. It spreads on my face and neck evenly without leaving a white cast. It seems to have a decent hydration property, too. Finally, it doesn't irritate my skin at all, which is tremendous. I have severe allergies and extremely sensitive skin. There are many products out there I simply can't use. This isn't one of them. Hurray!I haven't yet tried the serum but look forward to it.
## 34                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        L'Oreal makes such great products, I have really never been let down by anything that I have tried from them. This sunscreen is so nice and doesn't feel heavy or greasy on my skin at all. Definitely will continue to order this again.
## 35                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 36                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 37                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 38                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 39                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Cetaphil Body Moisturizer is a game changer for anyone with sensitive skin! The 20 oz bottle is perfect for daily use, and the fragrance-free formula is gentle yet incredibly hydrating. It absorbs quickly without leaving any greasy residue, making it ideal for all skin types. I love that it’s hypoallergenic and non-comedogenic, so I don’t have to worry about breakouts or irritation. My skin feels soft and nourished all day. This moisturizer is a reliable staple in my skincare routine and highly recommended for anyone needing a gentle, effective lotion!
## 40                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The Cetaphil Hydrating Moisturizing Lotion is a reliable and straightforward moisturizer that delivers balanced hydration without irritation. Its gentle, fragrance-free, and hypoallergenic formula makes it a versatile choice for people with sensitive or reactive skin. The non-greasy, lightweight texture ensures that it can be comfortably worn throughout the day, while the multi-pack offers great value for regular users. Though it may not be rich enough for extremely dry skin, it’s an excellent option for daily moisture maintenance.
## 41                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Cetaphil Moisturizing Lotion is lightweight, non-greasy, and perfect for sensitive skin. It keeps my skin hydrated all day without causing irritation.
## 42                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      I don't like body lotions that feel sticky, but this body lotion really makes me feel very good to use. It absorbs quickly after application and does not stick to the clothes when I put it on. It is also very moisturizing. My skin is very dry, and sticking to it is really friendly to my skin. Oh, by the way, I don't like scented body lotions, but this one is just odorless! ✌🏻
## 43                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           After using the Cetaphil for 2 weeks, there was a noticeable difference with my skin. The thick absorbency and easy application helped the dry, cracked areas to remain moisturized. It looked and  felt a lot better!
## 44                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            my go-to moisturizer. I have extrememly dry and sensitive skin and these really help without irritatingbor making me feel oily and gross. They keep me moisturized all day from one application. I use on face every time I wash my face and on body too. I don't think that long term they have any benefit, cause overtime my skin hasnt changed but keeps moisturized while using.
## 45                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The quality is so soft and lightweight, non greasiness on the skin. This moisturizer absorbed so amazing. So I was breakout with whelps out of no where which came from stress and less vitamin on my skin and dryness. This was the only lotion was effective towards my problem and fixed it.
## 46                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   I have severely sensitive skin that often breaks out even with dermatology-recommended items that claim to be for sensitive skin and have no fragrance. This lotion is exactly as described and works great. It is not greasy or sticky and maintains moisture all day. It’s also great for combination skin. Highly recommend for anyone with sensitive skin!
## 47                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Classic, moisturising and ultra safe !!!

Not sticky .
