## 68                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           My face is very sensitive and every time I use other lotions,  I always seem to break out. This is the only face lotion that works on my sensitive skin type and locks in moisture. It doesn't cause my face to break out and I simply love this product! Great value.
## 69                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          I wanted an everyday moisturizer for when I'm at home or not necessarily worried about SPF.  This is it.  It makes your skin feel incredibly soft and super moisturized. Totally non-greasy and lightweight. A little goes a long way, and it's long lasting, worth the $! A new staple in my skincare.
## 70                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            I use tretinoin so my skin can get sensitive and I have Rosacea on my cheeks so they get RED HOT sometimes. I was using First Aid Beauty's ultra repair moisturizer which has an oat complex in it but is a bit pricey. I tried this and fell in love with it on my first application! It is a nice creamy-gel formula which feels great on my skin. My face loves the oat kernal in it and it sinks in quickly, leaving no sticky feeling and moisturizes so well! It has helped calm my skin down with the tretinoin use, and the picture above I'm not wearing any makeup on my face except a tinted SPF for skin protection and a little blush because my redness is finally gone!!! My skin feels and looks incredible. I cannot recommend this more for any skin type.5/5I wish it came in a tube ite pump for sanitary reasons but I won't complain! Love this product so much
## 71                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Super gentle, not irritating, no scent, absorbs quickly, eases tightness and dry feeling. This is strictly a moisturizer - there are no skin treatment ingredients - but that’s fine with me. My skin looks better since I’ve been using this. This is on the lighter side of moisturizers. In winter, I might put this on first to shield my sensitive skin under a heavier cream for more moisture. This is a very good product and I will continue using it.
## 72                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              I have very sensitive skin and this product works great to calm down redness. The containers lasted a very long time as you just need a little bit.
## 73                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       This moisturizer has helped so much. I use this in conjunction with cerave foaming cleanser and acne cleanser since I was diagnosed with rosacea a couple years ago and this is the only moisturizer I can really use now. All other moisturizers feel like they burn but not this one. This one is cooling and makes my face buttery soft. Put it on a little after your shower or after washing your face, pretty much when your face still has water soaked in and it will absorb the moisturizer better to lock it in.
## 74                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Nice and lightweight!
## 75                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         This is one of my top three favorite facial moisturizers. It has a luscious texture, doesn't have any fragrance, and leaves my skin soft without being shiny. So why did I rate it only 3 stars? Because the packaging is so egregiously wasteful, it infuriates me. They made the outer box big enough to fit two jars but it comes with one jar held in place by more cardboard so it doesn't rattle around. And the jar is the absolute worst. I have posted some images of a side by side comparison with another facial moisturizer so you can see for yourself. The Aveeno jar is larger but holds less product than the other brand. (Aveeno: 1.7 oz in a 2.5" diameter plastic jar; $11.10/ oz at time of this review; Mad Hippie: 2.1 oz in a 2.125 diameter glass jar; $13.33/oz at time of this review) The Aveeno Jar has a double wall creating the illusion that it is a much bigger amount of product. It is a shameful waste of material and even though I love the moisturizer, it makes me so mad that I frequently go to other brands that have less wasteful packaging practices. If it wasn't for the packaging, this moisturizer would definitely be 4 stars, or even 5 for me, but I just cannot abide by companies using resources in such a careless and disingenuous way. It is irresponsible and unnecessary.
## 76                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   While the actual product maybe alright, the size is actually a trial size which costs about the same as full size. Hence feeling cheated.  The photos shown in the description are of the actual size product.

After apply it, it helps a lot for his dry area and no more itchiness.

## 96                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             <NA>
## 97                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I recently received my jar. I almost didn’t order it, because it’s not a body butter and it isn’t scented. However, I saw it listed in a popular weekly magazine as one of the top 50 beauty products of 2024. I figured they must know something I don’t, so I gave it a shot.First, it’s a healthy sized jar; you get a decent amount for the low price. When I opened the jar, I was doubtful that the lightweight looking cream could penetrate the dry skin on my legs, but I was so very wrong! I put about a teaspoon of cream on each leg, and my skin started absorbing it like I’ve never seen before. As I massaged it in, I felt a new smoothness emerge quite quickly. My legs have never felt this good to the touch in the last 20 years. It did not leave a greasy residue, yet it worked better than a heavy body butter. I couldn’t detect a scent at all. In the morning, my legs still felt just as supple as when I applied it, so it seems to have staying power. I decided to put some on my face, and I wasn’t disappointed. My flaky t-zone disappeared immediately with no shiny afterglow.The hydration provided by this product is second to none! I will be buying this from now on for my body and face.
## 98                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This CeraVe cream is a lifesaver! My skin feels so soft and hydrated without being greasy. It’s thick but absorbs quickly, so it’s perfect for day or night. I have sensitive skin, and this doesn’t cause any irritation at all. Plus, it’s fragrance-free and keeps my skin feeling smooth and moisturized all day. If you’re looking for a great everyday cream that actually works, this is it!
## 99                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 I have very dry skin so I slather on moisturizer every single day after I shower. CeraVe is amazingly moisturizing and absorbs well with no lingering stickiness. The product is unscented which is not my preference but since the jar is so big, I put some in a separate jar and add essential oils for my own scented blend. The first time I purchased I was a bit alarmed by the fact that the jar did not come in a sealed box or with safety seal under the jar lid. Every jar I've ordered has come this way, not sure why. Great product, great value!
## 100                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      As we age our skin gets thin and years . My husband , especially, has had this happen . This is odorless and has actually helped his arms retain the moisture and improved his thinning skin . He and I use it everyday after our showers.
## 101                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    I usually have oily skin, but dry when it’s winter, and the moisturizer has been very helpful. It does make my face shiny which I find a little annoying.Though it keeps my skin smooth. It can also last like a year or more depending on how much you use.
## 102                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I’ve struggled with very dry skin, and this product has been a great solution. It effectively keeps my skin moisturized without feeling too heavy or greasy. Additionally, it has a subtle or non-existent scent, which I appreciate.Let me know if you’d like any adjustments or more details added!
## 103                      I’ve always struggled with dry, flaky skin, especially during the colder months. No matter what I tried, nothing seemed to help for long—my skin would go back to feeling tight and irritated after just a few hours. That is, until I came across CeraVe Moisturizing Cream.At first, I wasn’t expecting much, to be honest. I’d seen it mentioned here and there, but I thought it was just another hyped-up product. Well, I was so wrong! The first time I applied it, I could feel an instant difference. The cream is thick but not greasy—it absorbed quickly and left my skin feeling soft, hydrated, and calm, without that oily layer that some moisturizers leave behind. And the best part? It lasted all day. My skin felt nourished and smooth from morning until night.What really sold me was that it’s developed with dermatologists and contains 3 essential ceramides and hyaluronic acid. These ingredients help to restore the skin’s natural barrier, which means it works long-term, not just as a temporary fix. Plus, it’s fragrance-free and non-comedogenic, so it doesn’t irritate my sensitive skin or cause breakouts.I’ve been using it for months now, and honestly, I can’t imagine my routine without it. It’s become my go-to for both face and body, and I even carry a small tub with me when I travel. I’ve noticed that my skin is much healthier overall—less redness, more even texture, and just a natural glow that I never had before.If you’re tired of dry, uncomfortable skin and want something that truly works, CeraVe Moisturizing Cream is it. It’s affordable, effective, and backed by science. I recommend it to everyone I know, and now I’m telling you give it a try, you won’t be disappointed!
## 104                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       I saw this cream advertised on TV and thought I should try it since I try everything hoping to get a moisturizing cream that really works on my lower legs and feet (I garden a lot and it leaves me with rough skin).  It works!  And, it lasts!  My skin feels moisturized even 4-5 hours later.  There's no fragrance (hallelujah!), and it goes on easily.  The cream's not thin (no drips), but not too thick and pasty either.  It's not greasy and doesn't leave foot prints in my leather shoes (if I wait about 15 minutes before putting them on).  I'm a fan now and will likely always have it available after a shower......
## 105                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Muyy buena crema, superHidratante, la uso con un adulto mayor (94 años)Mantiene su piel hidratada a pesar de lo delgado de su piel..

## 107                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Initially I received a damaged parcel from Amazon, but I bought it again after getting a refund from them. It works wonders on any type of skin. My sister has extremely dry skin & no moisturizer we've used till now worked. But after using Cera Ve there's been a huge difference in her skin.

## 109                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I loved it. It makes my dry skin so soft and smooth without making it oily and breakout. One jar was enough for whole year even after using it daily.
## 110                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      At first, the reviews were good and I bought it but after I received the product I saw that it contained petrolatum: same as vaseline. I was worried it was going to break me out but I was wrong. It feels amazing and I use it on my face right after bathing and my skin is never dry and feels plump and full. Love it

## 122                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 123                                                                                                                                                                          I love this product! It is creamy and does not give me any acne. I have dry and acne prone skin so it is HARD to find something that is both hydrating and doesn't flare up my acne. This has simple ingredients that don't agitate my sensitive skin and it is fragrant free, so I can safely use it around my eyes. It is hydrating and does help with moisturizing. At first, it wasn't hydrating enough on it's own but when I put a serum, or have other products underneath as a part of myskincare (I have a serum, and use a toner with salicylic acid that has hyaluronic acid in it), it is definitely moisturizing enough on its own. Nowadays, it is actually moisturizing all on it's own, I wonder if I needed to rebuild my skin barrier for that to become the case. The price is absolutely incredible and the ingredients are phenomenal!!! I love that it has squalane oil, as that's something that is both moisturizing and gentle and a bunch of ceramides which help your skin barrier stay intact! Fabulous ingredients and an amazing product that is super sustainable to purchase over and over again. I am so grateful it's affordable, since we are constantly having to use moisturizer, it's one of the most important things to do for you skin, keep it moisturized and wear sunscreen! I also love that it is 3 oz and feel so grateful since most moisturizers give you the tiniest bit. This brand feels very loving to their customers and it feels like they care about us and want their products to be accessible. I will continue to buy over and over again!
## 124                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            I have very sensitive, oily, acne prone skin and I have spent thousands of dollars exploring skincare and this beats everything. Seriously, this moisturizer is the BEST and I will never waste my money on a high end one ever again. I’ve seen drastic improvement in my acne and texture. It feels light and soft on the face (not greasy) and wears well under makeup. My friend with super dry skin tried it too and she can’t get enough. It’s also pretty clean ingredients-wise and you can’t beat the price for the value!!
## 125                                                                                                                                             I'm in my early 40s and have developed dryness and puffiness around my eyes and oiliness everywhere else. I'm also fairly certain I may have some undiagnosed eczema and rosacea.I bought this cream when I started to get an occasional patch of dry, scaly skin around the corner of my left eye. This is my suspected eczema. It's nothing drastic, but annoying and noticeable. I used another well-loved brand that cost just as much for a 1oz tube that didnt solve the problem. I have to say that I haven't had the patch of dry skin reappear since I starting using this lotion.I wasn't expecting this, but I've also noticed that my skin tone tends to be more even, with less redness in my cheeks and less dark circles under my eyes. I feel like my skin is smoother as well. I still have some puffiness around my eyes, but nothing like I had before.I'm not one to stick with a skin care regime,  but I find myself wanting to apply this everyday just because it makes my skin feel so good and hydrated. I think that's the key to sticking with anything, you have to enjoy it. I'm really surprised at how many benefits I've experienced with this product which makes me want to try more from the brand.It's not too thick, it feels good working into my face and neck, and has zero scent. It does take a few minutes to fully absorb but after that I'm golden. I've found that it works well under makeup too. Bonus points for being in a soft squeeze tube where I feel like I can get every last drop as opposed to a hard plastic, narrow necked pump bottle where product gets left behind.
## 126                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             The Vanicream Daily Facial Moisturizer with Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid is a great option for sensitive skin. It's lightweight, absorbs quickly, and provides long-lasting hydration without feeling greasy. I appreciate that it’s free from irritating ingredients like fragrances or dyes, making it perfect for my reactive skin. The added ceramides and hyaluronic acid keep my skin feeling smooth and moisturized throughout the day. The only downside is that it could be a bit more moisturizing for very dry skin, but overall, it's an excellent everyday moisturizer for those with sensitive or normal skin types.
## 127                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 So light and moisturizing. This is a no-frills moisturizer that truly works! Love that it doesn’t have a scent and is easy to blend into skin. My skin is smooth and this moisturizer does not cause breakouts!
## 128                                                                                                                                   Because of lifelong sensitivity, as well as autoimmune disorders I developed later in life, I have to be really careful with my skin, and the products I use. I'd been using the same moisturizer for a few years with no problems, until all of a sudden, I developed an allergy to it. My skin became dry, flaky, and irritated, to the point that I was nearly in tears. I treated it with Aquaphor, which helped, but knew I had to find a new moisturizer for every day use.Enter Vanicream. After an exhaustive search, which included reading every review available (as well as recommendations from two close friends after they found out that I was considering buying this), I finally decided to go ahead and give it a try.To say that I'm glad I did would be the biggest understatement of the year! From the first application, my dry, sensitive skin felt soothed and moisturized, without any sort of allergic reaction response. I was surprised to find that even though the consistency is more lotion than cream moisturizer, you don't need that much, and just one application in the morning, combined with a few drops of pure argan oil first, keeps my skin hydrated and healthy until the next day, whereas I used to have to apply my old cream in the morning, and again at night...and I'd still wake up with my skin feeling dry again.While this is the perfect moisturizer for anyone with highly sensitive skin, I'd recommend it to anyone looking for a product that's free of harsh ingredients and chemicals as well.Bottom line...Vanicream saved my skin. It's an affordable skin miracle worker!
## 129                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          For context I have dry, sensitive, clog/acne prone skin and I break out easily with acne and closed comedones. I get irritated, red itchy skin easily, and this moisturizer is perfect! It’s a little thinner, but I like to layer on a facial mist, or a hydrating serum underneath this and the ceramides really help soothe and calm down my skin while the hyalouronic acid keeps my skin so hydrated! I like that it’s fragrance free and has a very minimal ingredients list, but don’t let that fool you because this moisturizer keeps your skin soft, plump, and happy for so long that the next morning I don’t even moisturizer because of how glowy my skin is (no it’s not oily or greasy).Highly recommend for anyone looking for a simple, but powerful moisturizer!! ✌️
## 130                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Tengo piel sensible y atópica, es la única crema facial que no me irrita y tiene además otros activos que vale la pena probar.
## 131

## 133                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Nice moisturizer for sensitive skin
## 134                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                I bought this as a substitute for CeraVe’s moisturizing cream because it contains similar ingredients but this one has even more ceramides. It tingles like CeraVe but has a lighter consistency. It’s not thick and dries fast and keeps skin hydrated for quite a while. Very good cream to mix with other active ingredients.
