## 145                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 146                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 147                                                                                     For those battling dry and sensitive skin, the AESTURA ATOBARRIER365 Cream offers a promising solution. This Korean moisturizer is packed with ceramides, which help repair and strengthen the skin barrier, providing long-lasting hydration for up to 120 hours. The creamy texture absorbs quickly without leaving a greasy residue, making it suitable for both day and night use. It’s especially beneficial for areas prone to dryness, such as elbows, knees, and hands.The non-comedogenic formula is a big plus for those with acne-prone skin, as it hydrates without clogging pores or causing breakouts. I’ve noticed a significant improvement in my skin’s texture and moisture levels after consistent use, with reduced irritation and redness. The lightweight formula also makes it a great base for makeup, ensuring a smooth and hydrated canvas throughout the day.However, there are a few areas where this cream could be enhanced. The scent is quite subtle, which is generally good, but some might prefer a more noticeable fragrance to make the application feel more luxurious. Additionally, the packaging could be more user-friendly; the pump dispenser works well, but it occasionally dispenses too much product at once, leading to some wastage.Overall, the AESTURA ATOBARRIER365 Cream is a highly effective moisturizer for those seeking intense hydration and barrier repair. It offers a good balance of effectiveness and comfort, though it may require consistent use to achieve and maintain desired results. A solid 4-star rating for its powerful ingredients and lasting effects, with room for improvement in packaging and fragrance.
## 148                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   This is hands down the best moisturizer I’ve ever used! It literally saved my skin after I went overboard with vitamin C and ended up with a chemical burn. It’s like magic in a jar—calms down my hormonal acne redness and works wonders after exfoliation.The texture is thick, with these tiny ceramide balls that melt into your skin, locking in moisture like a charm, especially if you’ve got normal to dry skin. No scent either, so it's great if you’re sensitive to smells. If your skin barrier is shot, this is your hero.Perfect for East Coast winters, but heads up—it’s a little too heavy for summer. Still, for dry, irritated skin, this stuff is gold!
## 149                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Overall ★★★★★Effectiveness ★★★★★Price ★★★☆☆Safe ★★★★★Re-purchase? YesI've been using the [AESTURA ATOBARRIER365 Cream] consistently for over three years now, and it remains my go-to moisturizer. I initially discovered it through a well-known cosmetic YouTuber who tested various creams and highlighted this one as having the best, safest ingredients. Despite its high price, I haven’t looked back since.First Impressions: The compact size of the 80mL tube might catch you off guard considering the price, but the quality inside makes up for it. The cream is a bit thicker than most, but it strikes the right balance between richness and oiliness. It contains small capsules that dissolve as you rub the cream between your hands, releasing ingredients that help lock in moisture and protect your skin from dryness.Performance: As someone with oily skin, this cream has been perfect for me all year round. My sister, who has dry skin, also loved it—though she found it a little less effective during very dry winters. The fact that she bought her own after trying mine says a lot about its versatility.Pros:Suitable for various skin types, from oily to drySafe, gentle formula for sensitive skinCons:Could be more affordableOverall, it’s an amazing, high-quality product—definitely worth the investment!
## 150                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            i’ve had really bad experiences with products that go viral but this moisturizer is fantastic! absorbs into the skin almost immediately and it’s so lightweight. it’s not sticky at all and wears perfectly under makeup. the only complaint that i have is the smell. i can’t figure out what it smells like but it’s not pleasant.
## 151                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       I have pretty dry skin and I was surprised by how long this lotion kept my face moisturized! It's cool seeing the beads kind of melt into my skin and I also like how the packaging is travel-size friendly.But like the other reviews here, I would probably use this as a night moisturizer because it does feel a little too moisturizing in the day time unless you have super, super dry skin/ live in a dry environment. I brought this cream with me when I traveled to a relatively humid environment and I think my skin got clogged up and it became a bumpy texture because it got TOO moisturized, so be sure to patch test!I've been using the Cerave moisturizer on my face before I tried this one out. And after patch testing it for a few weeks, I don't really see any physical differences between the two moisturizers to be honest. They both moisturized and hydrated my face overnight and the texture is pretty similar. Since I didn't see a difference on my skin, I might stick to Cerave because it's a bit more budget friendly.Overall, I'm glad I tried this product out! I think this is a great moisturizer because it does get the job done and it kept my skin moisturized for a long period of time.
## 152                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 I have combination, sensitive, acne prone skin.This hydrates SO WELL that I've been able to increase my tretinoin to 5 nights per week with zero added irritation.Also, does not feel thick at all but moisturizes better than many thick creams on the market.
## 153                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               I usually never review, but this product is too amazing to gate keep.  If anyone that has dry and sensitive skin, this cream will change your skin game.  It goes on so smooth and not greasy.  It doesn't have a scent, which I love. I used in to protect my skin barrier and works like magic!
## 154                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     L'huile de jojoba contient plus de céramides, aucun intérêt
## 155                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## 156                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Es la mejor crema de todo los tiempos! A comparación de otras cremas de lujo que son más caras, esta es muchísimo mejor, ya hablo de la composición, el simple hecho de que no tenga perfume te da la seguridad de que es un muy buen producto. Recomendado!♥️
## 157                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## 158                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             I've been using the AESTURA ATOBARRIER365 Cream for a few weeks now, and it has truly transformed my skincare routine. As someone with dry and sensitive skin, finding the right moisturizer has always been a challenge, but this cream has exceeded my expectations.First of all, the texture is fantastic. It’s rich and creamy without feeling heavy or greasy on the skin. The visible capsules in the cream are a unique touch – they melt right into the skin, providing an extra boost of hydration. It absorbs quickly, leaving my face feeling soft, smooth, and deeply moisturized.One of the standout features of this cream is its long-lasting hydration. The 100-hour hydrating claim is no joke. My skin stays hydrated and comfortable throughout the day and night, even in dry, air-conditioned environments. The patented lipid complex with ceramides has done wonders for my skin barrier, reducing redness and irritation significantly.I also appreciate that it’s dermatologist-tested, which gives me peace of mind knowing it's safe for my sensitive skin. The 80mL size is generous, and a little goes a long way, making it great value for the price.Overall, the AESTURA ATOBARRIER365 Cream is a game-changer for anyone with dry and sensitive skin. It provides lasting hydration, soothes irritation, and leaves your skin looking and feeling healthy. If you’re searching for a reliable and effective moisturizer, I highly recommend giving this one a try!
## 159                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 I don't understand why I don't know this moisturizer for a long time. This is so perfect cream texture for my very sensitive acne-prone skin. At first, I hesitated because of the price but with the effect on my skin for only a few times, I would repurchase no matter what. It feels so soothing and yet gives healthy skin a glow from beneath. I bought a lot from Korean Market sellers too and everything they sell is high quality and authentic. Highly recommended!
## 160                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Great for hydration. I use it daily at night and have not had any irritation or breakouts. Skin feels smooth and hydrated the next morning.

## 174                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream is a must-have! This cream has a rich, luxurious texture that absorbs beautifully without leaving a greasy residue. The ceramides and hyaluronic acid work wonders overnight, and I’ve noticed softer smoother skin since I started using it. As someone with sensitive skin, I appreciate that this cream is fragrance-free and non-comedogenic. It’s gentle yet effective and hasn’t caused any irritation or breakouts. A little goes a long way.
## 175                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream has been a great addition to my nighttime skincare routine. It’s packed with niacinamide, a peptide complex, and hyaluronic acid, which all work together to keep my skin hydrated and smooth. The texture is rich but not greasy, and it absorbs well, leaving my face feeling soft and refreshed by morning.I’ve noticed my skin looking more even and plump after using it for a few weeks. A little goes a long way, so the 1.7-ounce jar lasts a good amount of time. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a quality night cream that provides serious hydration and a boost to your skin’s texture!
## 176                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     I have been using this night cream for the last 2 years and it is SOOO lovely!! Very hydrating, smoothing, no fragrance, and gentle on my sensitive skin. I love putting this on right before bed on my face and neck. One small jar lasts me a long time too!! Definitely worth the money.
## 177                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     This is a thick product so I can only use it fall/winter. No irritation, fragrance, and the texture is very creamy. Perfect for those with dry skin issues.
## 178                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Goes on smooth and feels light. Works well on my sensitive, oily skin.
## 179                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Second time I have purchased this cream. I love this brand! The cream itself leaves my face feeling moisturized, smooth and not sticky or heavy like other brands.
## 180                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           The CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream is an excellent moisturizer that truly works overnight to improve skin texture, hydration, and overall appearance. It’s packed with high-quality ingredients and feels great on the skin. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable, effective night cream. This is definitely a staple in my skincare routine now!
## 181                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             My go to night cream that runs a small fortune and doesn’t seem to really be making my skin feel better is getting shelved for CeraVe. I really like the feel  of this cream. It stays a tad tacky on my face which some may not like, but I feel it’s actually doing some good where my long time night cream has never left me wowed over.There’s not a cream in the world that will reduce wrinkles, so don’t expect that miracle, but if a cream makes you feel better, that’s what matters.Completely scent free which is exactly what both my asthma and skin need.Best part….I save all my CeraVe plastic containers for mixing paint. They work perfectly for the job and these little jars are going to be a perfect addition to my craft bench when they’re empty. Bonus!
## 182                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Me deja la piel suave, hidratada y radiante. Es espesa, con muy poco alcanza para toda la cara. La amo. La volveré a comprar. Es un básico para mí.
## 183

It does moisturize skins.  My skin does not break out with pimples. The price is average.
## 185                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  It’s one of the best skin care product I laid my hands on. My skin has become smooth and I see it’s anti aging effectiveness ♥️
## 186                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Very calming cream specifically if you are using retinol cream at night this soothes the irritations caused by retinol it have ceramides and peptides I love it
