## 197                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 198                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 199                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 200                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              When I bought this, I wasn't paying attention, because if I had been, I would have seen that it wasn't formulated for oily skin in particular - which is what I usually check and usually won't buy unless it is made for just for oily and combinations skin because my skin is super oily. However, ever since peri-menopause kicked off in my body, I am now getting dryness exactly where you don't want it: the under eye area.The great thing about this moisturizer though is that it is creamy, lightweight, and sort of feels like a gel or water cream. It goes on smooth and silky and absorbs quickly, leaving my skin soft and hydrated, but not oily. I think it has the best texture of any moisturizer that I've ever tried, and I've tried A LOT. It is also priced fairly and you get more than a couple of months worth in the bottle (seriously, I use it twice a day, and after over two months, I still have like half a bottle, but two pumps covers my face and two more cover my neck and décollete).If you're on the fence, get it. It's affordable and seems to work for all skin types. I love it. It is my current go-to moisturizer.
## 201                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      This moisturizer is great for morning or night.  Note only the day time one has SOF if you need that.It’s very light weight and is great for morning and even routines.If your skin is very dry and maybe cracked, this product probably won’t be for you as it is very very light.For the rest of us, I think this is perfect for after cleansing. It’s at a great price point, it goes into my skin fast and isn’t oily.It really a great moisturizer for my daily routine.  I love that it has ceramides and something else in it to help with the health of your skin.
## 202 I decided to try this product after seeing some influencer reviews and reading about the ingredients. I have sensitive skin and I was looking for a night cream that would hydrate, calm, and soothe my skin without causing any irritation or breakouts. I also bought the moisturizing cream from the same brand, I used it interchangeably with this moisturizer for different purposes.  This product is amazing. It feels moisturizing and lightweight on my skin, and it leaves it feeling dewy, soft, and smooth. It has improved my skin texture and appearance, and it has helped with my skin barrier and moisture levels. It also calms my skin after using other products that might be irritating, such as scrubs or acids. It does not have any fragrance added but it does have a nice clean fresh smell to it which I appreciate, and it does not clog my pores or cause any skin reactions. In fact, it seems to improve any acne or breakout reactions from harsher skin products and negates the effects they may have had without using it.  I use it during the day sometimes, and it does not make my skin oily or shiny. It is easy to spread and you do not need a lot of product to cover your face and neck. I even had an issue spot on my leg that the cream was too thick for and every other product seemed to irritate more and this was very helpful in clearing things up.  I would highly recommend this product to anyone with sensitive skin and needs a night moisturizing cream that will hydrate, calm, and soothe their skin. It is worth every penny and I would buy from this brand again. This is the best creams I have ever used for my skin. It is a 5/5 product for me. Will definitely buy again. CeraVe wins with this for me.
## 203                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              I’ve been using this product for quite a few years and it works great for me.  I have sensitive skin and a lot of other face creams don’t work for me.  The Cerave PM is gentle and goes on very light, absorbs well and doesn’t leave your skin sticky or greasy.  I use it morning and night as the daytime one bothers my skin.
## 204                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          I like this lotion works great but is it worth the money? Honestly the Cerave Baby Lotion works just as well for a fraction of the price and is formulated to be extra gentle on skin (it’s meant for babies after all). For my money I’ll just stick with the baby lotion on my face.
## 205                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          A life saver! Does not irritate skin! It's smooth, non- greasy, works well with prescribed face/skin care products. Very moisturizing!
## 206                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             This is a pretty great little moisturizer for my skin type. I have oily, acne-prone (plus sensitive) skin and I needed a lightweight lotion that wouldn't break me out but is moisturizing enough to help repair a damaged skin barrier (from acne products like BP and salicylic acid.) This baby is doing the trick. If you're looking for something rich, this ain't it. If you're looking for a genuinely light weight product that does a decent job without causing breakouts, I recommend. My skin is looking much better after just a few weeks of use. I don't wear makeup so can't say how it wears under foundation or w.e. And I also sometimes add an occlusive on top to really trap the lotion into my skin so that could be helping, too. Either way, the lotion feels good. It's light. And my skin looks and feel better. Hope this helps any gals like me! It's a bummer to have both oily/dry sensitive/acne-prone skin, lol. Wishing you luck!
## 207                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       I needed to find a budget-friendly moisturizer that worked for SUPER sensitive skin. I am happy to report that this moisturizer fits the bill. It's affordable, does not irritate my sensitive skin, moisturizes very well, soaks into my skin quickly, and works well for my combo dry skin.I have hormone-related acne that seems to be ever-present, so I do not know if this causes breakouts or not.
## 208                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Deja la piel deliciosa para la mañana
## 209                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## 210                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 جميل جدا خفيف على البشره غير معطر ينفع البشره الدهنية والمختلطة
## 211                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## 212                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        It has great ingredients and seems authentic. Loving it.
## 213                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Light yet moisturising!
## 214                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Very lightweight indeed .. my skin feels smooth after waking up 😊
## 215                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>

## 220                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 221                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 222                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 223                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 224                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 225                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 226                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <NA>
## 227                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I recently tried this product, after using other moisturizers over the years. All I can say is...I LOVE IT! Super luxurious feel, and the scent is divine. I wish L'Oreal would make a perfume from that scent. I'd wear it every day! Thank you for making such a delightful and affordable product.
## 228                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Triple Power Anti-Aging Face Moisturizer, Pro Retinol, Hyaluronic Acid & Vitamin C to Reduce Wrinkles, Firm & Brighten Skin really does what it claims and MORE! I use this in the morning after I wash my face, but before applying my foundation for the day. It's an integral part of my routine to also use this in the evening after I remove my makekup for the day, but before bed. This leaves my skin hydrated yet moisturized, but also acts as a solid base for my foundation making it not only stretch farther but also moisturizing my skin and helping with fine lines and wrinkles that come with aging. I LOVE the versatility of this product and its light scent. This is one of my most favorite staples and I highly recommend L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Triple Power Anti-Aging Face Moisturizer, Pro Retinol, Hyaluronic Acid & Vitamin C to Reduce Wrinkles, Firm & Brighten Skin. Give it a try, I think you'll love it.
## 229                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 I like the soft feel of this. Not greasey, and it smells nice too.I’m not sure of the effect it’s advertised for. But I’ll take some time and see how it works. It’s a nice moisturizer though.
## 230                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I saw this being reviewed by a beauty specialist on The Mark and Kelly Show and thought I would give it a try.  It came highly rated for the key triple action ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin C, and Pro-Retinol. It's rare to find all three of these ingredients in one moisturizer.  It is wonderful!  Feels incredibly nice on your skin; very light and non-greasy.  Also goes perfect under makeup.  I Highly recommend!
## 231                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Just trying this product for a first time, I think it has a great and light texture that makes my skin absorbed it quick. I also use this before makeup up and noticed that it gives my skin enough moisture that doesn’t make my makeup get cakey. (I got a new product that actually sealed, just saying since I’m kinda scared when I saw lots of reviews that they received the used one, I think the shop checked their products more carefully currently so don’t worry)
## 232                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Product was a free sample from L’Oreal , which was advertised by many celebrities as providing excellent quality of improvement in the appearance of fine lines and overall quality of their skin.  The price point is affordable.  The results equal that of higher priced similar products.
## 233                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      BUT IT'S NOT WHAT I ORDERED ....... I ordered triple power cream and I received regular moisturizer? and I see there's several of us getting this issue..... has anyone ever reached out to loreal to see if this is new packaging? I think i will reach out to loreal it's still wonderful cream. just not what I ordered
## 234                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Not only does it help with ageing - it’s a balm for my very sensitive facial skin.  No greasiness.
## 235                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         He visto resultados desde que la compre
## 236

## 238                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Light, not cakey, dries nice and smoothly and feels good on my skin. Pleasantly surprised and my skin already looks brighter after a few days! Workin mama approved! 👍🏻
## 239                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Se la regale a mama el Día de las mamas, y le encantó su crema, me comenta que su cutis en la cara está más humectante.

  'https://www.amazon.com/Herbal-Essences-Shampoo-Conditioner-Rose/dp/B086S4Q7JH/', #2
  'https://www.amazon.com/Olaplex-No-5-Bond-Maintenance-Conditioner/dp/B07D37SBHF/', #3
  'https://www.amazon.com/Wella-Invigo-Enrich-Shampoo-10oz/dp/B07PP9MXYY/', # 4
  'https://www.amazon.com/Living-proof-Shampoo-Perfect-Women/dp/B0BQ3YFRC5/', # 5
  'https://www.amazon.com/Nizoral-Anti-Dandruff-Shampoo-Ketoconazole-Fresh/dp/B0BP8BXZ8M/', #6
  'https://www.amazon.com/Nioxin-Cleansing-Peppermint-Sensitive-Progressed/dp/B005NOPU2G/', #7 
  'https://www.amazon.com/Head-Shoulders-Classic-Daily-Use-Anti-Dandruff/dp/B07F38LXDM/', # 8
  'https://www.amazon.com/Nutrafol-Improves-Strength-Physician-formulated-Thinning/dp/B09XS8F3P2/', # 9
  'https://www.amazon.com/Biolage-Hydrasource-Hydrates-Moisturizes-Paraben-Free/dp/B00J9WZZWI/')
scrape_reviews <- function(url) {
  session <- bow(url, user_agent = "Educational")
  review_page <- scrape(session)

  product_name <- review_page %>% 
    html_nodes('span#productTitle') %>% 
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  reviewers <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-profile-name') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_dates <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-size-base.a-color-secondary.review-date') %>%
    html_text()
 review_dates_clean <- gsub("Reviewed in [a-zA-Z ]+ on ", "", review_dates)
  
  review_titles <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.review-title') %>%
    html_text()
  review_titles_clean <- gsub("\\d+\\.\\d+ out of 5 stars", "", review_titles)
  review_titles_clean <- trimws(review_titles_clean)
  
  verified_purchase <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('span[data-hook="avp-badge-linkless"]') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_texts <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('div[data-hook="review-collapsed"] span') %>%
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  max_length <- max(
    length(reviewers),
    length(review_dates_clean),
    length(review_titles_clean),
    length(review_texts),
    length(verified_purchase),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  product_name <- rep(product_name, length.out = max_length)
  reviewers <- c(reviewers, rep(NA, max_length - length(reviewers)))
  review_dates_clean <- c(review_dates_clean, rep(NA, max_length -   length(review_dates_clean)))
  review_titles_clean <- c(review_titles_clean, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_titles_clean)))
  review_texts <- c(review_texts, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_texts)))
  verified_purchase <- c(verified_purchase, rep(NA, max_length - length(verified_purchase)))
  
   reviews <- data.frame(
    Product = product_name,
    Reviewer = reviewers,
    Date = review_dates_clean,
    ReviewTitle = review_titles_clean,
    ReviewText = review_texts,
    VerifiedPurchase = verified_purchase,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
   
  return(reviews)
}

all_reviews <- lapply(product_urls, scrape_reviews)
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
reviews_df <- bind_rows(all_reviews)

print(reviews_df)
