##                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 ReviewText
## 1                                                                      As a 32-year-old with curly and heavily dyed hair, I've tried numerous products to maintain the health and vibrancy of my locks. Olaplex No. 4 Bond Maintenance Shampoo has been an absolute game-changer, earning high praise for its effectiveness and results.Restorative and Strengthening Formula:This shampoo works wonders in repairing the damage often associated with dyeing and heat styling. Its bond-building technology not only strengthens hair from within but also ensures long-lasting resilience. After just a few washes, I noticed my curls appeared more defined and less prone to breakage, transforming my hair’s overall texture and strength.Gentle Yet Effective Cleansing:Olaplex No. 4 provides a thorough cleanse without stripping my hair of its natural oils, which is crucial for maintaining hydration in curly hair. The gentle formulation ensures that my hair feels clean and refreshed, but never dry or brittle, preserving its natural bounce and shine.Color-Safe and Nourishing:One of the standout features for me is its color-safe formula. It helps preserve the vibrancy of my dyed hair, preventing the dreaded fade that often accompanies frequent washing. My hair not only looks healthier but also retains its salon-fresh color longer.Luxurious Feel and Lather:The shampoo has a rich lather and a pleasant fragrance, making each wash feel like a mini spa experience. It's concentrated so a little goes a long way, offering great value and ensuring the bottle lasts.Outstanding Results:Since incorporating Olaplex No. 4 into my haircare routine, I've received numerous compliments on how healthy and lush my hair looks. It has become an indispensable part of my regimen, providing the right balance of strength and nourishment.Conclusion:Olaplex No. 4 Bond Maintenance Shampoo is a must-have for anyone with curly, color-treated hair. Its ability to repair, strengthen, and protect makes it an invaluable ally in maintaining gorgeous, healthy curls. For its exceptional performance and transformative results, I highly recommend it. Five stars! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
## 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          This is one of the very best shampoos that exist. I found it for 50% off yesterday so $15 instead of $30. I’m on a budget but I had to buy two! This is kind of one formula does it for everybody type of shampoo. It’s thick,  it lathers up nicely, and it doesn’t make my hair oily which I tend to lean to the oily. It doesn’t leave a residue. This is very highly rated shampoo. All the products in this line are and they deserve to be. If you are undecided and reading 200 reviews, buy this!  You won’t regret it.
## 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      This shampoo made my hair feel super soft. I recently washed my hair with this and now, it's a staple. I love how it makes my hair feel and look. Highly recommend!
## 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The bottle is heavy, so there is physical evidence that the formula is dense, as described. A little goes a long way. If I am trying new shampoo, it means I have an adversarial relationship with my hair. I was on a trip to northern Michigan, found a breakfast place in a 90% abandoned strip mall, and spotted a hair salon open, just over there. I came this close to walking in. I don't know what No. 4 Bond Maintenance means, but I haven't enjoyed my hair as much for years. I have been zoning my hair - leave-in conditioner on the ends, thickness spray in the middle and hair repair on the thinning top. Then I have to remember to not brush through. Don't touch! Hair spray to hide that balding cowlick. And now? I didn't remember I have a great haircut that has reached its optimum viewing. I have waves! I have shine! I have a new favorite shampoo.
## 5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       This Shampoo #4 is part at a system. ( I previously used the #3 Hair Strengthener first) This shampoo is great, it cleans hair. I have very sensitive skin (Excezma)  after using this shampoo there is no irritation or itching on scalp. Hair feels great, no perfume odors. Simple clean smell.  The system is a little pricey #3, #4, and #5  were all bought together, but it’s worth the Money…. See my other reviews #3 and #5.  Believe me it’s worth spending the money!!
## 6                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           I’ve never been a huge fan of any hair product I’ve tried. I recently noticed a lot of breakage of my hair, enough that I was constantly being asked by people if I got a haircut. I’ve only been using this for a month, and I notice a difference. I don’t notice my hair being any longer, but I’m sure I will with time. I’m not losing hair like I used to though! I actually used to wash my hair daily because it would look greasy if I skipped a day. Now, I wash 2-3 days a week and it looks fabulous every day. You don’t need nearly as much product as you think you’d need. Only docking a star because it’s expensive. However, I’m willing to watch for sales and keep using!
## 7                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        A small amount, the sizes of a nickel is all you need. I only give 1 wash instead of 2 and my hair is very clean.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    It was packaged well. It’s what you’d expect. I love these products, they smell nice and work well with my hair.
## 31                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            I’m absolutely thrilled with the Herbal Essences Shampoo and Conditioner Set from the Smooth Collection! This set has quickly become a favorite in my hair care routine, and I couldn’t be more pleased with the results.First off, the scent is incredible. The combination of Vitamin E, rose hips, and jojoba creates a delightful, fresh fragrance that lingers just long enough to make each wash feel like a little luxury. It’s a pleasant aroma that makes the entire shower experience more enjoyable.The performance of the shampoo and conditioner is equally impressive. My hair feels noticeably smoother and shinier after just a few uses. The formula is gentle yet effective, and it leaves my hair feeling clean without stripping away natural oils. Plus, it's paraben-free and safe for color-treated hair, which is a big plus for maintaining my hair color and overall health.What’s even better is the value for money. The 29.2 fl oz bottles are a great size, and getting them in a 2-pack makes the price a steal! I feel like I’m getting high-quality products at an unbeatable price, which is always a win.Overall, the Herbal Essences Smooth Collection Shampoo and Conditioner set is a fantastic buy. It combines a beautiful fragrance, effective performance, and great value, making it a standout choice for anyone looking to enhance their hair care routine. Highly recommended!
## 32                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     I've been using this shampoo and conditioner for a very, very long time and they do the job for me.
## 33                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 The Herbal Essences Shampoo & Conditioner Set, Smooth Collection is a fantastic choice for anyone looking to achieve sleek and manageable hair. This paraben-free and color-safe duo is infused with rose hips and vitamin E, providing essential nourishment while ensuring your color-treated hair remains vibrant. Users love the lightweight formula, which effectively smooths frizz and leaves hair feeling soft and silky without weighing it down. Each bottle contains 29.2 fl oz, offering great value for the price. Overall, this set is a delightful addition to any hair care routine, promoting healthy, shiny hair with every wash.For more detailed reviews and user experiences, check out sources like Allure and Good Housekeeping.
## 34                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         This is a great package, it arrived quickly, and FEELS WONDERFUL on my hair, making my hair very soft, too. I will definitely buy this again!👍

## 47                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 I can’t even begin to explain the bliss I felt after using this for the first time this morning, but I’ll surely try. I ordered this late last night because I realized I was out of conditioner…it got here before I needed to shower at 7 am. I did some research because I’m blonde, but not naturally, so my hair gets tangled very fast, and this came up many times. Kinda pricey..but worth itI was disappointed when I rinsed it out in the shower because my hair felt tangly as it usually does after I shower. I was like “I spent $30 on this for what..?” My main goal was to get soft hair like it feels after I go to the salon. This did not disappoint! Once I did the blow dryer, my hair was so soft. I was shocked. I am not sure what it is, but this stuff made my hair silky smooth. I highly recommend if you have tangly hair!
## 48                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         I purchased the Ola Plex System #3 Pre wash, #4 Shampoo, and #5 Conditioner.  My other reviews provided information on #3 and #4.This review is for #5 The Hair Conditioner. I have very sensitive skin and this product(s) do not irritate my skin. It’s very smooth and creamy. It has a lite clean smell (no perfume smell) it makes your hair feel clean and smooth. Your hair feel and look fuller, and manageable , No tangles. You can really tell the difference after the first use. It works best as a system.  The system #3, #4, and #5 is a little costly, however it’s truly worth every penny!  You must try it!
## 49                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            AMAZING! i had this for over a year and i only used it once and then one day i was like “lemme actually use this” and omg im never not using this product again. my curl pattern has never looked so good and the elasticity of my hair is amazing. this is definitely worth the price and it’s now a staple in my routine. both the shampoo and conditioner
## 50                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Only issue I had with this product is the size yes I did read the measurements but once received it did seem small although I have been using it for about 4 months now 2 to 3 times a week. People with thinner or more straight hair this should last you awhile.As titled this is the best conditioner I HAVE EVER USED!  I'm somewhat new to hair care from the few product I've tried and my og tressame this is 10/10. I don't know where this ranks in the hair care tier list you probably have more knowledge of that than I do but I've noticed,Hair growth, softness, hair health. After showering my hair just looked darker and healthier than it did in a long time I can't explain it but again 10/10.
## 51                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         I used 0,3 and—after using my purple shampoo—5. After the first use my  frizzy, dry gray hair had more elasticity, shine and smoothness and fullness.  Expensive yes, but worth it. Maybe I can start loving my gray after all!
## 52                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The Olaplex No. 5 Bond Maintenance Conditioner has done wonders for my hair’s health! I noticed an improvement in smoothness and strength after just a few uses. It really helps reduce breakage and leaves my hair feeling soft without weighing it down.The only downside is the price—it’s definitely on the higher end, especially for a conditioner. But if you have damaged or color-treated hair and are looking for something to make a real difference, it’s worth the investment. A little goes a long way, so the bottle does last a while.
## 53                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             I LOVE this conditioner. Before I started using it my hair was damaged and breaking, filling my brush every time I used it. Now after using it awhile my hair is healthier and find none or very little in the brush. I was really worrying my hair coming out but it didn't long at all using the shampoo & conditioner that my worried were over. This is what I plan to use from now on and hope it continues to keep my hair healthy. HIGHLY RECOMMEND.

## 73                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Good conditioner for thinning hair prone to breakage. Locks in moisturizer well. Leaves hair soft but not weighted down which is important for thin hair
## 74                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       One of the "gifts" of aging is thinning hair. My hair is thin and fine to begin with, so I decided to give this Nioxin System 2 shampoo a try. The first couple of times I used it, it seemed to make my hair even softer and finer, which was not what I was after. But after the 3rd and 4th shampoo, my hair was still soft and fine, but with more body. And, I have to say, I am not seeing as many fallen hairs in the shower, which is great! I recommend this shampoo, but wish it was sold in a smaller quantity bottle.
## 75                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The fragrance of Nioxin System 2 is a harmonious blend of freshness and cleanliness. It's not overpowering but leaves a subtle and pleasant scent on the hair. The lingering fragrance gives a feeling of a salon-fresh experience each time.The Nioxin System 2 Cleanser and Conditioner have exceeded our expectations. It's not just a shampoo; it's a holistic approach to hair care that addresses both the roots and the strands. For anyone struggling with fine or thinning hair, this dynamic duo from Nioxin is undoubtedly worth the investment. We're thrilled with the results, and we'll continue to be loyal fans of Nioxin's System 2!
## 76                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Seems to work well. Have not used it long enough to determine if it thickens hair.
## 77                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               I have very thin hair and i've been using this product for more than 30 years. It's gentle and effective.
## 78                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 My cosmetologist recommended this thickening shampoo, and I couldn’t be happier with the results! My hair feels noticeably fuller and has more volume, without any heaviness or greasiness. The formula is lightweight, lathers well, and has a pleasant, subtle scent. It also leaves my hair refreshed. I’m so glad I took my cosmetologist’s advice.
## 79                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             My husband is being using it for years and his hair is stronger and not longer falling as much as it used to. Very happy with this product!
## 80                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 My hair is fine and soft, and it is easy to fall out. I want it to be a little fluffy and last longer after washing. In addition, my hair was itchy some time ago. Later, I saw this shampoo and used it for a while and I think it is not bad. The fluffiness and lastingness are okay, but my hair still falls out. But I found that tzmaxx sells it cheaper.. Only about 20 dollars.

## 91                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                This has great lather, and cleansing of hair and scalp. Spouse uses it and likes the large  ones with pump on top. It’s easier for him to use as he has trouble holding and squeezing. We have run out a couple of times and the flakes from his scalp and face under beard returns. We now have on automatic refill. He likes the smell, ease of use and effectiveness.
## 92                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       Good price for these they are big bottles!  Pump works well ... and none of us have dandruff so must be it works!
## 93                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Great pump dispenser, good product
## 94                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Makes dandruff proof, smells great, like the easy dispensing, and no more itching!
## 95                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Overall a step up from regular head & shoulders. I believe this is supposed to be their "salon quality" shampoo. I deducted a star because I still have a very small amount of dandruff on my temples and sideburns (I recommended head and shoulders royal oils scale cream if you have this issue). Also I switched to this shampoo from head and shoulders dry scalp because my scalp has gotten itchier lately and this has not helped after 2 weeks (I'm starting to think the itch is neuropathy now). However overall I like this shampoo & I think I will keep using it. See below.My hair: pixie cut. Straight but very thick, I feel like I lose a fair amount of hair but since it's so thick it's not significant. Dandruff, hair oil makes flaking worse but some parts of scalp get dry.Pros: Light, not overbearing pleasant fragrance. I was worried it would be too flowery! Helps dandruff like regular H&S. Argan oil & rose essence are moisturizing. Lathers great. It feels soothing when i put it on although that stops after the shower. My hair feels so much softer and looks shinier than with H&S 2-in1 products! Also there are no sulfate, paraben, and some other things (see bottle) that can possibly irritate the scalp. Bottle looks fancy.Cons: still contains fragrance as an ingredient so some may find it irritating if very sensitive. Did not help my itch. More pricey than regular H&S.
## 96                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Great price with free delivery to top it off.
## 97                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                wow, the price has climbed through the roof!  lol.well, not much i can do.i like how it leaves my hair, and it helps significantly in controlling my dandruff.gotta have it.i use 4 or 5 different shampoos at any given time (including a medicated one available only by prescription), and i need this one as part of the rotation.:)
## 98                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          This shampoo is widely known and I have nothing else to add.The seller was correct and the communication was good.I was informed timely about changes on the details.All fine.
