 ## 101                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   <NA>
## 102 The manufacturer positions Biolage Hydra Source Shampoo as a product specifically designed for dry and brittle hair. Its primary goal is to restore and moisturize damaged hair, which is particularly relevant for those struggling with split ends and tangled strands.Nowadays, dryness of hair is very common because we often use blow dryers, curling irons, and straighteners, as well as subject our hair to chemical treatments, particularly during coloring. As a result, hair loses its vitality and natural moisture, becoming not only brittle but also thinner, with ends starting to split—though you likely know all of this already. One aspect of this issue is that it looks unkempt or less than presentable, but the other side is that your hair is simply unhealthy.This is where Biolage Hydra Source Shampoo comes into play, which, according to the manufacturer, does not contain parabens or other harsh ingredients. In theory, this means the shampoo should act gently.My experience using this shampoo was surprisingly positive. First of all, I want to note its light texture, which doesn’t leave any feeling of greasiness or residue on the hair after use. You know how sometimes it feels like you haven’t rinsed out the shampoo properly, and it’s still left in your hair? This shampoo lathers very well, making it easier to apply, and as you might have guessed, it also rinses out easily. After the first use, my hair felt softer and easier to detangle, which is especially important for those with not only dry but also long hair, like mine.Personally, I don’t pay much attention to the scent of shampoos because once you leave the bathroom, no one can usually smell it. But if this is important to you, the scent is pleasant, not overwhelming, and somewhat natural.As for the repair of split ends, I can’t say the results were immediate. No, unfortunately, that’s not the case; I had to wait several weeks of using the shampoo. However, with regular use, I noticed significantly fewer split ends.In conclusion, this shampoo helped me address my problem, though of course, it's not a medical treatment but rather a cosmetic solution.
## 103                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             This shampoo smells amazing and more importantly is one of the few that actually work to smooth my hair. I have tried every known shampoo ever, trying to spend less money, but the cheap ones just aren't as good.There are three that work for me the best are  Redken's AllSoft, and Pureology. I alternate between them. I hate spending so much money for shampoo, but its the rare case where name brand, expensive brands are the ones that seem to work best on my hair and both my daughters who both have very long hair. (The texture of our hair is similar, although one has curly hair and the other's bone straight like mine.)The only thing I don't like about this shampoo is the price.
## 104                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            It does not take much of the BiolageShampoo to get a really nice sudsy lather. My hair feels great & has some welcome body.
## 105                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               my hair was so dry and frizzy  this brought it back to life. soft  curls and body  scalp feels better toowell worth the price  don't need a huge amount either.  winner!
## 106                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      I love this shampoo! It hydrates my hair perfectly and smells so good.  Just like stepping out of a salon smell!  I give it 10 ⭐️
## 107                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   The version of this shampoo that I last bought had no parabens, no dyes and no SLS but with the same aroma. The point of buying this was to get a chemical free shampoo with a great smell, but unfortunately this one has SLS. That is the only con for me, otherwise this is a shampoo that I always come back to.
## 108                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Love itSmells good, feels good and leaves the hair soft.
## 109                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            We use biolage for our shampoo and conditioner, and had just ran out of shampoo (husband has longer hair than me so we use more, and I have to wash my hair everyday because of my job environment). We can't always drive to our hairdresser to buy more, so I looked on here and it's about the same price, and not only that, it's not that much more than if you bought the small bottle. It's a really big bottle, so it should last us quite a while.My husband gets dry hair extremely easy, so that's the original reason we went back to Biolage. The moisture shampoo and conditioner is a great combination of you want to add some back to your hair. Even with washing my hair every day, my hairdresser said recently that my hair still looks really good, and my split ends are getting better. Definitely worth the money!

product_urls <- c( 'https://www.amazon.com/Yara-Lattafa-Perfumes-Eau-Parfum/dp/B09C8VNWBP/', #1  
  'https://www.amazon.com/Victorias-Secret-Pure-Seduction-8-4oz/dp/B09V1RMFTP//', #2
  'https://www.amazon.com/Calvin-Klein-ETERNITY-Eau-Parfum/dp/B00021AJ5I/', #3
  'https://www.amazon.com/DKNY-Delicious-Parfum-Perfume-Spray/dp/B000E7STLQ/', # 4
  'https://www.amazon.com/Victorias-Secret-Tease-3-4-Ounce/dp/B07GT42VY6/', # 5
  'https://www.amazon.com/Thierry-Mugler-Eau-Parfum-Alien/dp/B08ZXY1B7H/', #6
  'https://www.amazon.com/Daisy-Marc-Jacobs-Toilette-Ounce/dp/B0012RQZ72/', #7 
  'https://www.amazon.com/Ralph-Lauren-Women-Toilette-Natural/dp/B000C1W3OS/', # 8
  'https://www.amazon.com/masatow-Women-Pheromone-Perfume-Roll/dp/B0C746QXL1/', # 9
  'https://www.amazon.com/Michael-Kors-Wonderlust-Parfum-Spray/dp/B00RK1C3AW/')
scrape_reviews <- function(url) {
  session <- bow(url, user_agent = "Educational")
  review_page <- scrape(session)

  product_name <- review_page %>% 
    html_nodes('span#productTitle') %>% 
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  reviewers <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-profile-name') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_dates <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-size-base.a-color-secondary.review-date') %>%
    html_text()
 review_dates_clean <- gsub("Reviewed in [a-zA-Z ]+ on ", "", review_dates)
  
  review_titles <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.review-title') %>%
    html_text()
  review_titles_clean <- gsub("\\d+\\.\\d+ out of 5 stars", "", review_titles)
  review_titles_clean <- trimws(review_titles_clean)
  
  verified_purchase <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('span[data-hook="avp-badge-linkless"]') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_texts <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('div[data-hook="review-collapsed"] span') %>%
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  max_length <- max(
    length(reviewers),
    length(review_dates_clean),
    length(review_titles_clean),
    length(review_texts),
    length(verified_purchase),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  product_name <- rep(product_name, length.out = max_length)
  reviewers <- c(reviewers, rep(NA, max_length - length(reviewers)))
  review_dates_clean <- c(review_dates_clean, rep(NA, max_length -   length(review_dates_clean)))
  review_titles_clean <- c(review_titles_clean, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_titles_clean)))
  review_texts <- c(review_texts, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_texts)))
  verified_purchase <- c(verified_purchase, rep(NA, max_length - length(verified_purchase)))
  
   reviews <- data.frame(
    Product = product_name,
    Reviewer = reviewers,
    Date = review_dates_clean,
    ReviewTitle = review_titles_clean,
    ReviewText = review_texts,
    VerifiedPurchase = verified_purchase,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
   
  return(reviews)
}

all_reviews <- lapply(product_urls, scrape_reviews)
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
reviews_df <- bind_rows(all_reviews)

print(reviews_df)

##                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         ReviewText
## 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               My mom loves this perfume. It’s very subtle and the price is awesome. I couldn’t find anywhere else cheaper than the Amazon rate. Highly recommend
## 2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Packaged nicely, scent is very nice, & good price considering other similar perfumes.
## 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     This perfume is lovely and it smells so pretty. This is my new daily perfume, or until I find a new one. Good value for the money. $46 for 1.7 is a really good price; it’s very expensive in the stores, and Jacob’s website. It appears to last all day if you spray enough. After washing your clothes the fragrance is still there. I’m assuming this is authentic being sold on Amazon.
## 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Ladies this spray will make your man want to eat you with your clothes on. The smell is every thing. I’m back to order another one
## 5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Always love Marc Jacobs scent, never disappoints
## 6                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Light, airy, summery, flowers.  Enough said.
## 7                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Smells so good great price for the size definitely would buy again
## 8                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Couldn’t ask for a better product. Nice smell and not overwhelming
## 9                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Ganadora de la casa Marc Jacobs.

## 22 The Ralph Lauren Ralph Eau de Toilette, gifted to my wife, has become a beloved addition to her fragrance collection. This women's perfume is a timeless scent that embodies elegance and charm. I am delighted to provide a five-star review for this exceptional fragrance.Timeless Elegance:One of the standout features of this Eau de Toilette is its timeless elegance. The fragrance exudes sophistication and is suitable for various occasions.Light and Refreshing:The scent is light and refreshing, making it perfect for everyday wear or special events.Long-Lasting:This Eau de Toilette has a long-lasting scent, ensuring that it remains throughout the day without the need for frequent reapplication.Versatile:The versatility of this fragrance allows it to transition seamlessly from day to night, complementing various outfits and moods.Elegant Packaging:The Ralph Lauren packaging is elegant and makes for a beautiful gift presentation.In conclusion, the Ralph Lauren Ralph Eau de Toilette is a five-star fragrance for women that captures timeless elegance, a light and refreshing scent, longevity, versatility, and elegant packaging. Whether you're gifting it or indulging in it yourself, this perfume is a delightful addition to any fragrance collection. It offers a touch of sophistication and charm that can enhance your presence on any occasion. I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone seeking a classic and versatile women's perfume.
## 23                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Lo volví a comprar después de 15 años y si olor sigue igual. 🥰
## 24                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
## 25                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    This is a fresh, feminine, lively scent - not too strong, but it still lasts a good amount of time.  I purchased this for myself based on the description and am really happy with it, except...  the spray on it is way too aggressive.  It's like a stream with a bit of mist, not like any other spray I've had.  I'm adapting to how to aim it, but my arms aren't quite long enough to give me that mist to walk through that I prefer.

product_urls <- c( 'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-iO-Electric-Toothbrush-Rechargeable/dp/B0B5HRWH1S/', #1  
  'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-Rechargeable-Toothbrush-Intelligence-Replacement/dp/B084PPRXB5/', #2
  'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-iO-Electric-Toothbrush-Rechargeable/dp/B0B5HVM6JX/', #3
  'https://www.amazon.com/AquaSonic-Black-Ultra-Whitening-Toothbrush/dp/B072YVWBXH/', # 4
  'https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Sonicare-Toothbrush-Rechargeable-HX3681/dp/B09LD7WRVS/', # 5
  'https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Sonicare-ProtectiveClean-Rechargeable-HX6423/dp/B084TM4XKG/', #6
  'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-Health-Soft-Toothbrushes-Count/dp/B01KZ6V00W/', #7 
  'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-1000-Rechargeable-Electric-Toothbrush/dp/B003UKM9CO/', # 8
  'https://www.amazon.com/Oral-B-Bristles-Vivid-Toothbrush-White/dp/B06XK2M3H3/', # 9
  'https://www.amazon.com/Colgate-Charcoal-Toothbrushes-Bristles-Surface/dp/B0BQPSB3GG/')
scrape_reviews <- function(url) {
  session <- bow(url, user_agent = "Educational")
  review_page <- scrape(session)

  product_name <- review_page %>% 
    html_nodes('span#productTitle') %>% 
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  reviewers <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-profile-name') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_dates <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.a-size-base.a-color-secondary.review-date') %>%
    html_text()
 review_dates_clean <- gsub("Reviewed in [a-zA-Z ]+ on ", "", review_dates)
  
  review_titles <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('.review-title') %>%
    html_text()
  review_titles_clean <- gsub("\\d+\\.\\d+ out of 5 stars", "", review_titles)
  review_titles_clean <- trimws(review_titles_clean)
  
  verified_purchase <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('span[data-hook="avp-badge-linkless"]') %>%
    html_text()
  
  review_texts <- review_page %>%
    html_nodes('div[data-hook="review-collapsed"] span') %>%
    html_text() %>%
    trimws()
  
  max_length <- max(
    length(reviewers),
    length(review_dates_clean),
    length(review_titles_clean),
    length(review_texts),
    length(verified_purchase),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  product_name <- rep(product_name, length.out = max_length)
  reviewers <- c(reviewers, rep(NA, max_length - length(reviewers)))
  review_dates_clean <- c(review_dates_clean, rep(NA, max_length -   length(review_dates_clean)))
  review_titles_clean <- c(review_titles_clean, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_titles_clean)))
  review_texts <- c(review_texts, rep(NA, max_length - length(review_texts)))
  verified_purchase <- c(verified_purchase, rep(NA, max_length - length(verified_purchase)))
  
   reviews <- data.frame(
    Product = product_name,
    Reviewer = reviewers,
    Date = review_dates_clean,
    ReviewTitle = review_titles_clean,
    ReviewText = review_texts,
    VerifiedPurchase = verified_purchase,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
   
  return(reviews)
}

all_reviews <- lapply(product_urls, scrape_reviews)
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.

## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
## No encoding supplied: defaulting to UTF-8.
reviews_df <- bind_rows(all_reviews)

print(reviews_df)

##                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ReviewText
## 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The Oral-B CrossAction All in One Soft Toothbrush has exceeded my expectations! The soft, rounded bristles are gentle on my teeth and gums, but still provide a deep, effective clean. I love how it really gets into those hard-to-reach areas, removing plaque and leaving my mouth feeling fresh.The additional features like the tongue and cheek cleaner and gum stimulators are a game changer, making this more than just a toothbrush—it's a complete oral care tool. My gums feel healthier, and the overall cleaning experience is top-notch.With six brushes in a pack, this is a great value for the money, too. Highly recommend it for anyone looking for a thorough, gentle, and multi-functional toothbrush!
## 2  I am leaving this review in hopes that Amazon will no longer hound me for a review of this product.These toothbrushes are the greatest thing ever to happen to me in my lifetime. The softness of the bristles took me to places I had never imagined. The handle was so easy to hold that I decided to never let it go. I bring it with me everywhere. The ergonomic design is so beautiful that I proudly display it out in front of me when I walk down the street so the world can know what a terrific example of a human being I have become for having purchased the Oral B Toothbrush.Overall, I am very satisfied with this purchase and would recommend this product to every family member, friend, acquaintance, even random people I see in public. You can find me at busy street corners standing upon an apple crate or shouting from the hilltops about the Oral B toothbrush.Forget your religion. Go buy an Oral B toothbrush.If you feel overwhelmed by your troubles or distraught over global events, just brush your teeth.
## 3                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             I've been buying these toothbrushes for several months now and I have to say they are the best ones I have ever used. They really clean my teeth well along the gum line. I also like that there is a tongue scraper on the brush as well. I got a great deal getting $4 off on a pack of six on Amazon
## 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Quality pack of toothbrushes to take on trips, or to have extras for guests. Good value for the money, cleans teeth well, cannot go wrinkle NG.
## 5                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  I really like the size, softness of the brushes and the durability
## 6                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This is my go to toothbrush, I got the 6 pack because more is always better. I love the rubber bristles on the side as I feel I get a better clean than the average brush or the ones the have the rubber bristles in the middle of the brush. I also love that the bristle have different heights and are not flat like other brushes also giving me a better clean and getting into all those grooves that food go and hide in. It is the same price as it would be in the stores but saves me the trouble of having to go in just for toothbrushes.
## 7                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         They clean my teeth well.  I like the bristles.  The best toothbrush I have purchased to date.  Not too hard and not too soft.  Just right.
## 8                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              They have a newer variant of this in stores, but it includes little rubber bristles in the center of the brush. It's highly ineffective versus this older version, which has no rubber in the center. The rubber prevents the brush from going deep between teeth. This version does that better than any other brush I have found in the last decade or two.When I use these properly, a lengthy brushing, it's like you don't even really need to floss. It gets around and between the teeth so well. Flossing almost achieved just by this brush alone. For me that makes it worth seeking this version out online. I hope they have enough stock of this in warehouses that it can continue to be bought for a long time to come.
## 9                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Very pleased
## 10                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Al comprar no me percaté que eran grado suave pero afortunadamente para mi no son para nada suaves, se sienten de grado medio y las cerdas de silicona alrededor masajean la encía. Definitivamente los volvería a comprar.
## 11                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
## 12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               I find these cross action toothbrushes by Oral-B to be one of the best manual toothbrushes and Amazon is one of the easiest places to find them at a reasonable price. Delivery was fast and simple.
